full_text:
Kong Wen 孔文
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Kong Wen (孔文)was born in Lu commandery. Served as Minister Herald for Wei. A descendant of Master Kong (Confucius) in the 20th generation. Kong Wen was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
